# data-science-pipelines

> data-science-pipelines (also known as: DSP, dsp) is a Kubernetes component. managing 3 CRD(s): CompositeController, ControllerRevision, DecoratorController. deploying 11 workload(s) (squid, kubeflow-pipelines-profile-controller, ml-pipeline, ml-pipeline, ml-pipeline, cache-server, metadata-writer, ml-pipeline-persistenceagent, ml-pipeline-ui, ml-pipeline-scheduledworkflow, ml-pipeline-viewer-crd) with 11 container(s). exposing 2 service(s) on ports: 3128, 80. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 3000, 3128, 8443, 8888. protected by 1 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: grpc, minio, s3. runtime dependencies: MinIO/S3, MySQL, PostgreSQL, kubernetes. exposing 50 Prometheus metrics. with 2 ingress route(s). Python k8s client with 197 API call(s) and 1 CRD kind reference(s). integrates with Istio, Prometheus via labels/annotations. references components: argo-workflows (import), kserve (import, provider), kubeflow (import, provider), trainer (import, provider). mounts 2 ConfigMap(s) as volumes: kubeflow-pipelines-profile-controller-code, ml-pipeline-ui-configmap.
